network_boundaries.justification: Public-facing entry; behind WAF and OAuth/JWT validation.

network_boundaries.name: application

network_boundaries.name: isolation:pci
network_boundaries.justification: Sensitive classification (pci) — dedicated subnet, deny-by-default network policy, audit on every access.

next_steps: Author Container Apps / AKS manifest scaffolds per service from the placements above
Wire managed identities for each service and bind to Key Vault for secrets
Configure health probes (/healthz) on every API and gateway placement
Provision data tier per placement and verify backup policies in staging before prod
Apply dedicated subnet and deny-by-default NSG/NetworkPolicy for sensitive-data isolation boundary
summary: Deployment topology for ecommerce-order-platform on container_apps: 7 service placement(s), 5 data placement(s), 3 network boundary(ies), 0 gap(s); environment path dev → staging → prod.
